title: GoldenExample
description: One integration example for GEPA prompt evaluation: input logs and expected pipeline output documents.

id.description: Unique example/integration id (e.g. filename without extension)

input_logs.description: One log entry per element; each string is raw content for one doc. Use for .log lines, NDJSON lines, or stringified JSON.

expected_outputs.description: Expected _source after pipeline (one object per input log, same order)

source_format.description: Optional: how the example was produced (lines=.log, ndjson=one JSON per line, json_array=array elements)
